# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
# VPC Network - Using custom mode for security control over subnet ranges
# auto mode is explicitly avoided as it creates subnets in all regions with
# predictable IP ranges, violating least privilege and increasing attack surface
- name: three-tier-vpc
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    name: three-tier-vpc
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

# Web Tier Subnet - Only the regions and ranges we need
- name: web-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: web-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.1.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# App Tier Subnet - Isolated from web tier
- name: app-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: app-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.2.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Data Tier Subnet - Most restricted, no external access
- name: data-tier-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    name: data-tier-subnet
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    ipCidrRange: 10.3.0.0/24
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    enableFlowLogs: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      aggregationInterval: INTERVAL_5_SEC
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Firewall: Deny all ingress by default (explicit baseline)
- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"

# Firewall: Allow external HTTPS to web tier only
- name: allow-https-to-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    sourceRanges:
      - "0.0.0.0/0"
    targetTags:
      - web-tier

# Firewall: Allow web tier to app tier on specific port only
- name: allow-web-to-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
    sourceTags:
      - web-tier
    targetTags:
      - app-tier

# Firewall: Allow app tier to data tier on database port only
- name: allow-app-to-data
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "5432"
    sourceTags:
      - app-tier
    targetTags:
      - data-tier

# Firewall: Allow IAP for secure administrative access (replaces SSH from 0.0.0.0/0)
- name: allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      - "35.235.240.0/20"
    targetTags:
      - allow-iap-ssh

# Firewall: Deny all egress by default for data tier (prevent data exfiltration)
- name: deny-data-tier-egress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: EGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
    targetTags:
      - data-tier

# Firewall: Allow data tier egress only to Google APIs via private access
- name: allow-data-tier-google-apis
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
    priority: 900
    direction: EGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "443"
    destinationRanges:
      - "199.36.153.8/30"
    targetTags:
      - data-tier

outputs:
  - name: vpcSelfLink
    value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc.selfLink)
  - name: webSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.web-tier-subnet.selfLink)
  - name: appSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.app-tier-subnet.selfLink)
  - name: dataSubnetSelfLink
    value: $(ref.data-tier-subnet.selfLink)
